content: The Self-Refine framework for iterative output improvement can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-improvement system where single-prompt iterative refinement is interleaved with cross-perspective inconsistency detection to surface hidden flaws that single-stream self-feedback misses. This hybrid approach retains the core advantage of both methods: requiring no extra supervised training or external data, while fixing the common failure mode of single-stream self-refinement getting stuck in local minima of flawed output.
